topic.what: Mathematical analysis of carry bit probability distributions and their impact on linear and differential cryptanalysis of modular addition operations
topic.how: Derives closed-form probability formulas for carry bits; presents LAT and DDT construction algorithms; demonstrates recursive DDT extension using carry parity relationships
topic.why_matters: Enables systematic cryptanalysis of ARX ciphers (RC5, IDEA, SPECK) by providing principled methods for constructing approximation and difference tables

characteristics.what_it_measures: Probability that carry bit at position i equals 1
characteristics.evidence: Recurrence equation Pr[Ci=1]=1/4+1/2*Pr[Ci-1=1] with induction proof
characteristics.context: Proven via mathematical induction; Lemma 3 gives Pr[Ci=0]=1/2+2^{-i-2}

characteristics.what_it_measures: Deviation from perfect linearity for consecutive bit masks
characteristics.evidence: Piling-up lemma application; examples with 3-bit modular addition LAT
characteristics.context: Bias decreases exponentially with consecutive bit count in mask

characteristics.evidence: LSB of modular addition equals XOR without carry dependency
characteristics.context: Used in attacks on RC5 and IDEA algorithms

characteristics.what_it_measures: Probability that XOR of consecutive carry bits equals 0
characteristics.evidence: Theorem 1 proof using carry bit probability formula

characteristics.what_it_measures: Probability that output difference equals input difference for specific case
characteristics.evidence: Example 3 analysis; depends on MSB and bit position 2
characteristics.context: Per-bit probability 1/2 excluding MSB; 2^{-2} for 8-bit case

novelty: Closed-form carry bit probability formula Pr[Ci=0]=1/2+2^{-i-2}
LAT pattern analysis showing MSB constraints on mask combinations
Recursive DDT extension using carry parity partitioning (u/v sets)
Block-wise DDT construction structure: [[4v,4u],[4u,4v]] for γ=0 case
open_problems: Efficient computation methods for very large n-bit LAT/DDT tables
Impact of key scheduling on mask preservation across rounds
Automated mask selection algorithms for practical attacks
